sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76170" key="o)fruanaspasi/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀφρῠ-ᾰνασπᾰσίδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀνασπάω</etym>) <sense id="n76170.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who raises his eyebrows in scorn</tr_>, Epigr. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1392.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hegesand.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
